untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on advanced order management concepts (IOC limit orders, hidden liquidity detection, sequential ping logic with 2-second timing between probes, 3-ping exhaustion logic) that cannot be expressed using only standard technical indicators and basic comparison operators. Requires custom order flow and latency-dependent execution logic not available in backtester.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: vol_ratio_20 > 1.5 proxies for volume spike detection. However, the core signal depends on: (1) execution speed and order priority in real-time; (2) hidden order detection via IOC fill results; (3) time-based probe sequencing (2-second intervals); (4) state tracking across multiple orders. These require event-driven order management, not condition-based rules. The 'support/resistance level' is qualitative and not quantifiable without additional level-detection logic.
